experiment: L6 hunt the 5.3% + explain the last miss: Arm A dark-mass localize (SVD rank-ladder + greedy) / adjudicate (L1 battery) / re-transplant gate (BABEL-OQ-3); Arm B rung causal story: listeners fan-out, writer-vs-reader incl. locked.A1_bands: LOCALIZED-LOW-RANK k_loc<=8 / LOCALIZED-MID 8<k_loc<=32 / DIFFUSE k_loc>32 ; bet DIFFUSE40/MID35/LOWRANK25
locked.A2_bands: f=(NAMED+NAMED-REGIME-SPECIFIC)/n_adjudicated: ALL-DARK f=0 / NAMED-SOME 0<f<0.5 / NAMED-MAJORITY f>=0.5 ; bet ALLDARK45/SOME35/MAJORITY20

locked.B3_bands: LEAKAGE |Mcomp|<=null95c / MIXED >null95c & <|Mdirect| / GENUINE >null95c & >=|Mdirect| & signs ; bet MIXED40/LEAKAGE35/GENUINE25
